description_long: This bungalow features a long, rectangular structure with a modern wood-paneled exterior and large, black-framed windows. The front facade is dominated by a wide glass door flanked by a combination of vertical and horizontal window panels, providing ample natural light. The side elevations display a mix of window sizes, with one side having a more continuous wood finish and fewer openings, while the other side includes a large window and a smaller vertical slit window. The roof is flat, and the overall design is minimalist, with clean lines and a focus on functionality. The interior, visible through the windows, suggests an open-plan layout with distinct living spaces. The absence of a porch and the use of modern materials give it a contemporary urban appeal.
description: A modern, rectangular bungalow with wood paneling, large black-framed windows, and a flat roof, featuring a minimalist and functional design.
description_view_0: The front view shows a wide glass door with a geometric window arrangement and a large window to the left, set in a wood-paneled facade.
description_view_1: The left side view reveals the narrow end of the bungalow, highlighting the glass door and a glimpse of the interior layout.
description_view_2: The rear view displays a mostly solid wood-paneled wall with two windows: one large and one narrow vertical slit.
description_view_3: The right side view shows another narrow end with a large window and interior divisions visible through the glass.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical with large front and side windows
